opened_by: blockstream outage exposed chord_schema_conformance_test fetching one hardcoded height API
why_it_matters: test:unit is contractually net-independent; a transient external outage reddened CI on no real regression
residual_risk: truly-offline authoring still needs BTC_BLOCK_OVERRIDE; multi-source assumes >=1 provider is up

why_it_matters: antigravity wanted resolved proposals composted; codex required proving them reconstructable from git+resolution first
residual_risk: superseded proposals deferred; the git-rm trigger itself stays governance

why_it_matters: resolveConflict's comment claimed clock-immunity but broke exact-score ties on timestamp — a comment-lie and a real (minor) vulnerability
residual_risk: none — exact-score ties are rare; payloadMerkleRoot tie-break is deterministic

why_it_matters: world-touch density cannot prove action quality; a code-touch that closes no named gap counts as action, a refutation that prevents a bad write counts as talk
closed_by: this build (GAP_CLOSURE.v0 records + verifier) is the first step, not the closure
closure_result: pending — non-authoritative until two voices emit compatible gap refs and one closure receipt (codex's boundary)
residual_risk: not wired as a gate; gap-closure density is not yet the authoritative metric, by design

why_it_matters: VOICE_TICK was ratified law but had no runnable implementation — a voice could not gather inputs and scaffold its tick repeatably
closure_result: prints a read-only briefing + tick scaffold, exit 0
residual_risk: the PROPOSE half stays manual (the voice fills judgment + emits); self-waking daemon deferred to v1 per codex
